title: Dataset Schema
description: Canonical public dataset resource for evaluation workloads.

id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation set instance

parent_dataset_id.description: Optional identifier of the dataset instance this revision was derived from.

revision.description: Optional positive revision number for this dataset instance.

name.description: Technical name of the evaluation set (machine-friendly)

label.description: Human-readable name of the evaluation set

description.description: Detailed description of the evaluation set's purpose and methodology

type.description: Format type of the evaluation set

use_case.description: Primary use case this evaluation set is designed to evaluate

agent_type.description: Type of agent this evaluation set is designed to evaluate

examples_count.description: Total number of examples in the evaluation set

files.description: Files associated with this evaluation set for evaluation

examples.description: Examples associated with this evaluation set

splits.description: Optional split policy and per-example assignments for this evaluation set. Selection gates candidate acceptance. Test is locked until run finalization.

policy.description: Policy used to assign examples to train, selection, and test splits.

seed.description: Optional deterministic seed for hash-based split assignment.

locked_test.description: Whether the test split is locked. Test is locked until run finalization.

assignments.description: example_id -> split. Selection gates candidate acceptance.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this evaluation set was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this evaluation set

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the evaluation set

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering evaluation sets

source.description: Source or origin of the evaluation set data

license.description: License under which the evaluation set is distributed
